results.title: Welsh pop star Bonnie Tyler dies at 75
results.description: Bonnie Tyler, the Grammy-nominated Welsh pop star whose 1983 chart-topping power ballad "Total Eclipse of the Heart" enchanted succeeding generations during solar and lunar eclipses, has died. She was 75.

results.title: NCCA launches 2027 Competitive Grants Program, calls for proposals
results.description: THE National Commission for Culture and the Arts (NCCA) officially opens the Call for Proposals for the CY 2027 Competitive Grants Program. The NCCA Competitive Grants Program provides financial assistance to project proposals that undergo a three-level evaluation process and are approved based on merit and relevance to the Commission’s mandate and priorities set by the 19 NCCA National Committees for safeguarding, promoting, and developing Philippine arts and culture. Through the National Endowment Fund for Culture and the Arts (NEFCA), the NCCA provides assistance to Non-Government Organizations (NGOs), Peoples Organizations (POs), Indigenous Peoples Organizations (IPOs), Individuals, Local Government Units (LGUs), Government Agencies (GAs), State Universities/Colleges and Public Schools through its NCCA Competitive Grants Program, and Institutional Programs (NCCA Outreach Program, Resource Person’s Bureau, Technical Assistance Program). For the complete copy of the call for proposals, visit https://drive.google.com/file/d/1mwe8cVyT-_uhJ4IR9rTcTbCn8r855w-m/view All proponents must first secure NCCA Accreditation and must not have any unliquidated grant or derogatory record with the NCCA or any government agency. Project proposals with complete requirements may be submitted via email or courier to: Program Management Division (PMD), National Commission for Culture and the Arts, Room 5B, Fifth Floor, NCCA Building, 633 General Luna Street, Intramuros, Manila. For more information you may call (02) 8527-5535 local 524, 541, and 507, or email pmd@ncca.gov.ph. The deadline for submission is August 31, 2026 (Monday) at 11:59 PM (Philippine Standard Time).

results.title: Special Story: BSNL Launches Satellite Phone That Works Without Mobile Network, Priced at ₹1.34 Lakh
results.description: #ଟ ାୱାର_ଟେନସନ_ଗଲା #ଯ େଉଁଠି_ଥିଲେ_ବି_ଲାଗିବ_ଫୋନ BSNL ଆଣିଲା ଦମଦାର ଫେନ୍ । ବିନା ନେଟୱର୍କରେ ଚାଲିବ ମୋବାଇଲ୍ । ଅପହଞ୍ଚ ଉଲାକାରେ ବି ହେବନି କୌଣସି ଅସୁବିଧା । ଭାରତରେ ଯୋଗାଯୋଗ ବ୍ୟବସ୍ଥାକୁ ଆହୁରି ସୁଦୃଢ଼ କରିବା ପାଇଁ ସରକାରୀ ଟେଲିକମ୍ କମ୍ପାନୀ BSNL ଏକ ସ୍ୱତନ୍ତ୍ର ସାଟେଲାଇଟ୍ ଫୋନ୍ ଲଞ୍ଚ କରିଛି । BSNL has launched a new Satellite Phone in India to ensure communication even in areas without mobile network coverage. Unlike conventional smartphones, the handset connects directly to satellites instead of cellular towers, making it suitable for remote locations and emergency situations.
